subcodes.first_line: O son! Hearken unto the call of this Bird that warbleth upon the branches of the Lote-Tree of Eternity and summoneth the people unto [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا ابن اسمع ندآء هذه الطیر التی تغن علی افنان سدره البقا و تدعو الناس الی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God, @the power of words; of speech
